# 4st.li - Full Content

Personal website of astro. GitHub: [@astrovm](https://github.com/astrovm), X: [@astrovm](https://x.com/astrovm)

## Projects

- [Amy OS](https://github.com/astrovm/amyos) - Custom Fedora Atomic image built on top of Bazzite
- [Adventure Mods](https://github.com/astrovm/AdventureMods) - Set up mods for Sonic Adventure DX and Sonic Adventure 2 on Linux
- [Anomalous](https://anomalous.xyz/) - An Anomalous Research Society
- [Crosstune](https://github.com/astrovm/crosstune) - Open Spotify track links in YouTube Music or YouTube on Android
- [Flash Collection](https://flash.4st.li/) - Flash games archive
- [Inside the firewall](https://4st.li/insidethefirewall) - Videogame made in 2013
- [Respondedor de boludos](https://t.me/respondedorbot) - Telegram bot with AI based on Argentina internet culture
- [Timba](https://timba.cc/) - Coinflip game on Solana
- [Tdarg](https://tdarg.4st.li/) - A web with information about ADHD in Argentina
- [YTMusicFS](https://github.com/astrovm/ytmusicfs) - A FUSE filesystem for YT Music
- [FreshRSS](https://news.4st.li/) - Self-hosted news aggregator

## Configs

### PC Master Race
- OS: Kubuntu 26.04 LTS
- CPU: AMD Ryzen 5 3600
- GPU: AMD Radeon RX 6800 16 GB
- RAM: 32 GB (4x8 GB GeIL Super Luce DDR4 3200 MHz)
- NVMe: 1 TB (2x512 GB Adata XPG Spectrix S40G)
- Motherboard: ASUS TUF Gaming X570-PRO (Wi-Fi)
- Mouse: Logitech G305
- Keyboard: HyperX Alloy Origins Core with Razer Pink PBT keycaps
- Headphones: Audio-Technica ATH-M50x with FiiO BTA10 and Sony Inzone H9

Also: Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, Apple MacBook Air M1 2020, Samsung Galaxy S22 Ultra.

- Monero, Solana, Doge, TRON via Trocador

## Blog Posts

### Recovering a TRON wallet with an Android exploit and brute force (2026-03-22)

Technical walkthrough of recovering cryptocurrency from a locked TronLink Pro wallet on a Samsung Galaxy A31 (Android 12, security patch January 2024). Uses CVE-2024-31317 (Zygote injection) to escalate privileges, adb to extract protected app data from /data/data/com.tronlinkpro.wallet, then cracks the wallet password offline using hashcat with scrypt mode. Full reference repository at https://github.com/astrovm/2026-03-tronlink-wallet-recovery-reference.

### Don't invest in yourself (2024-05-12)

Essay criticizing the "invest in yourself" advice commonly given to young people. Argues that free knowledge is infinite online, time is more valuable than money for self-improvement, and keeping young people away from investing is harmful because of the compound interest advantage they have. Questions whether expensive education has guaranteed returns.

### Run, Think, Shoot, Live (2022-05-18)

Personal essay about discovering Half-Life at age 4 through a pirated CD that came bundled with Counter-Strike. Reflects on how Half-Life teaches strategic thinking over brute force, the value of running from problems, and the formative impact of the game's atmosphere and puzzle-like combat encounters.
